---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project using the User Story format.
title: '[FEATURE]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 👤 User Story
**As a** [role/type of user]
**I need** [the specific capability or feature]
**So that** [the value or benefit received]

---

## 📝 Details & Requirements
*List specific technical details or stakeholder requirements here.*
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2

## 🖼️ UI/UX (Optional)
*Add links to mockups or screenshots if applicable.*

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
*How will we know this is "Done"?*
1. [ ] The feature works as expected in the staging environment.
2. [ ] Automated tests pass.
3. [ ] Documentation is updated.
